name: Wordle AI Solver (Ollama)
description: Plays Wordle using a local LLM via Ollama. The AI guesses words, reads color feedback from the board, and adapts its strategy each round. On victory, posts a screenshot to Twitter.

step.description: Clear old game state and remove all ads/overlays
step.code: var ga = document.querySelector('game-app'); if (!ga) return 'ERROR: game-app not found'; if (ga.gameStatus !== 'IN_PROGRESS' || !ga.canInput) { localStorage.clear(); sessionStorage.clear(); location.reload(); return 'RELOADING'; } try { document.querySelectorAll('iframe, [class*="ad"], [id*="ad"], [class*="overlay"], [class*="banner"], [class*="popup"], [class*="modal"], [class*="cookie"], [class*="consent"], [class*="gdpr"]').forEach(function(el) { el.remove(); }); } catch(e) {} try { document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Close"], .close-icon, button.close, [class*="close"], [class*="dismiss"]').forEach(function(b) { b.click(); }); } catch(e) {} return 'Page cleaned';

step.description: Wait for any reload to finish
Close game rules dialog and all shadow DOM modals
step.code: var ga = document.querySelector('game-app'); if (!ga || !ga.shadowRoot) return 'No shadow root'; var sr = ga.shadowRoot; try { var closeIcons = sr.querySelectorAll('game-icon[icon="close"]'); closeIcons.forEach(function(icon) { icon.click(); var parent = icon.closest('button'); if (parent) parent.click(); }); } catch(e) {} try { sr.querySelectorAll('[class*="close"], [aria-label="Close"], .overlay, .modal').forEach(function(el) { el.click(); }); } catch(e) {} try { var modals = sr.querySelectorAll('game-modal, game-help, game-settings, game-stats'); modals.forEach(function(m) { m.style.display = 'none'; var overlay = m.querySelector('.overlay'); if (overlay) overlay.click(); }); } catch(e) {} try { var toasts = sr.querySelectorAll('game-toast-manager, [class*="toast"]'); toasts.forEach(function(t) { t.style.display = 'none'; }); } catch(e) {} try { document.querySelectorAll('iframe, [class*="ad"], [id*="ad"], [class*="overlay"]:not(game-app), [class*="banner"], [class*="popup"]').forEach(function(el) { el.remove(); }); } catch(e) {} return 'Dialogs closed, ads removed';

step.value: No guesses yet. This is your first guess. Pick a strong starting word with common letters (e.g. words using S, T, A, R, E, C, L, O, N, I).

step.description: LLM picks the next guess word
step.systemPrompt: You are playing Wordle. You MUST pick exactly ONE word from the Candidates list below. Reply with ONLY that single word, lowercase, no punctuation, no explanation. NEVER invent a word outside the list.
step.prompt:
{{feedback}}

You MUST choose one of these candidates. Reply with ONLY the word:

step.description: Type AI guess via on-screen keyboard (shadow DOM)
step.code: var raw = '{{aiGuess}}'.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, ''); var match = raw.match(/[a-z]{5}/); var word = match ? match[0] : raw.substring(0, 5); if (word.length !== 5) return 'ERROR: invalid word: ' + raw; var ga = document.querySelector('game-app'); if (!ga || !ga.shadowRoot) return 'ERROR: game-app not found'; var kbEl = ga.shadowRoot.querySelector('game-keyboard'); if (!kbEl || !kbEl.shadowRoot) return 'ERROR: keyboard not found'; var kb = kbEl.shadowRoot; function pressKey(key) { var btn = kb.querySelector('button[data-key="' + key + '"]'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return true; } return false; } for (var i = 0; i < word.length; i++) { if (!pressKey(word[i])) return 'ERROR: key not found: ' + word[i]; } await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 300); }); pressKey('↵'); return 'Typed: ' + word;

step.description: Read feedback and set gameWon flag
step.code:
var ga = document.querySelector('game-app'); if (!ga) return 'ERROR: game-app not found'; var bs = ga.boardState; var ev = ga.evaluations; var status = ga.gameStatus; var feedback = []; var absent = {}; var present = {}; var correctPos = {}; var guessed = []; for (var i = 0; i < bs.length; i++) { if (!bs[i] || !ev[i]) continue; var word = bs[i].toUpperCase(); guessed.push(word); var evals = ev[i]; var line = ''; for (var j = 0; j < word.length; j++) { line += word[j] + '(' + evals[j] + ') '; if (evals[j] === 'absent') absent[word[j]] = true; else if (evals[j] === 'present') present[word[j]] = true; else if (evals[j] === 'correct') { correctPos[j] = word[j]; present[word[j]] = true; } } feedback.push('Guess ' + (i + 1) + ': ' + line.trim()); } if (feedback.length === 0) return 'ERROR: no guesses found'; if (status === 'WIN') return 'GAME_WON'; var absentSet = {}; Object.keys(absent).forEach(function(l) { if (!present[l]) absentSet[l] = true; }); var words = 'aback,abase,abate,abbey,abbot,abhor,abide,abled,abode,abort,about,above,abuse,abyss,acorn,acrid,actor,acute,adage,adapt,adept,admin,admit,adobe,adopt,adore,adorn,adult,affix,afoot,afoul,after,again,agape,agate,agent,agile,aging,aglow,agony,agree,ahead,aider,aisle,alarm,album,alert,algae,alibi,alien,align,allay,alley,allot,allow,alloy,aloft,alone,along,aloof,aloud,alpha,altar,alter,amass,amaze,amber,amble,amend,amine,amiss,amity,among,ample,amply,amuse,angel,anger,angle,angry,angst,anime,ankle,annex,annoy,antic,anvil,aorta,apart,aphid,aping,apnea,apple,apply,apron,aptly,arbor,ardor,arena,argue,arise,armor,aroma,arose,array,arrow,arson,artsy,ascot,ashen,aside,askew,assay,asset,atlas,atoll,atone,attic,audio,audit,augur,aunty,avail,avert,avian,avoid,await,awake,award,aware,awash,awful,awoke,axial,axiom,azure,bacon,badge,badly,bagel,baggy,baker,baler,balmy,banal,banjo,barge,baron,basal,basic,basil,basin,basis,baste,batch,bathe,baton,batty,bawdy,bayou,beach,beady,beard,beast,beech,beefy,befit,began,begin,begun,being,belch,belly,below,bench,beret,berry,berth,beset,bible,bicep,biddy,bigot,bilge,billy,binge,bingo,biome,birch,birth,black,blade,blame,bland,blank,blare,blast,blaze,bleak,bleat,bleed,blend,bless,blimp,blind,blink,bliss,blitz,bloat,block,bloke,blond,blood,bloom,blown,bluer,bluff,blunt,blurb,blurt,blush,board,boast,bobby,boney,bonus,booby,boost,booth,booty,booze,boozy,borax,borne,bosom,bossy,botch,bound,bough,bousy,bowel,boxer,brace,braid,brain,brake,brand,brash,brass,brave,bravo,brawl,brawn,bread,break,breed,briar,bribe,brick,bride,brief,brine,bring,brink,briny,brisk,broad,broil,broke,brood,brook,broth,brown,brush,brunt,budge,buddy,buggy,bugle,build,built,bulge,bulky,bully,bunch,bunny,burst,bushy,butch,buyer,bylaw,cabal,cabin,cable,cadet,caddy,cagey,camel,cameo,candy,canny,canoe,caper,caput,carat,cargo,carol,carry,carve,catch,cater,cause,cavil,cease,cedar,chain,chair,chalk,champ,chant,chaos,chard,charm,chart,chase,cheap,cheat,check,cheek,cheer,chess,chest,chick,c var filtered = words.filter(function(w) { if (w.length !== 5) return false; var wu = w.toUpperCase(); if (guessed.indexOf(wu) >= 0) return false; for (var c = 0; c < 5; c++) { if (absentSet[wu[c]]) return false; if (correctPos[c] && wu[c] !== correctPos[c]) return false; } var ok = true; Object.keys(present).forEach(function(l) { if (wu.indexOf(l) < 0) ok = false; }); return ok; }); var candidates = filtered.slice(0, 10); if (candidates.length < 3) { var relaxed = words.filter(function(w) { if (w.length !== 5) return false; var wu = w.toUpperCase(); if (guessed.indexOf(wu) >= 0) return false; for (var c = 0; c < 5; c++) { if (absentSet[wu[c]]) return false; if (correctPos[c] && wu[c] !== correctPos[c]) return false; } return true; }); candidates = relaxed.slice(0, 10); } var summary = feedback.join('
'); summary += '
BANNED letters: ' + Object.keys(absentSet).join(', '); summary += '
MUST contain: ' + Object.keys(present).join(', '); summary += '
Candidates: ' + (candidates.length > 0 ? candidates.join(', ') : 'ivory, glyph, nymph'); summary += '
Do NOT repeat: ' + guessed.join(', '); return summary;

step.description: Check if game is won and set flag variable
step.code: var ga = document.querySelector('game-app'); if (ga && ga.gameStatus === 'WIN') return 'true'; return 'false';

step.text:
Just beat Wordle with an AI agent powered by @LoopiBrowser! 🤖🟩

Local LLM (llama3.2) + browser automation = unstoppable.

#Wordle #AI #Automation #Loopi
